signals.headline: Ripple Launches Unified Treasury System on April 13, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple Launches Unified Treasury System on April 13, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple announced a new platform merging SWIFT and XRP rails for corporate payments and liquidity, targeting broader adoption.[5] This resolution enhances XRP's utility and could influence April price predictions on platforms like Polymarket, where bullish scenarios (e.g., above $1.4 at 56%) are prominent.[1][8]
